sources.sourceTitle: Block-STM: Scaling Blockchain Execution by Turning Ordering Curse to a Performance Blessing
sources.summary: Block-STM uses optimistic parallel execution and conflict detection to execute ordered blockchain transactions in parallel while preserving deterministic results.

sources.sourceTitle: Parallel EVM Execution and Conflict-Aware Scheduling
sources.summary: Parallel EVM systems depend on transaction dependency prediction, state access patterns, and conflict rollback costs.

sources.sourceTitle: State Hotspots in High-Throughput Smart Contract Execution
sources.summary: State hotspots and storage I/O can dominate execution latency even when scheduling allows parallel execution.
